title: Manufacturing Engineer - Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions:
Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions!
